name: Carnage Heart-Inspired World Simulator
description:
Currently WIP. Lorebook for background lore, terminologies, and other shenanigans are still underway.

This is a world simulation inspired by Carnage Heart, but the mech aspect isn't exactly explored deeply here yet. For now, I'm focusing on the space politics part for the world-building first.

I'd recommend using a proxy AI instead of JLLM. Also, you might have to use the chat memory more often or get more memory for the bot to remember the laws and insurances affecting you on a causational scale. That is, if you want those little details remembered.

As for your beginning scenario parameters, I would recommend being an employee first while you get familiarized with how this world simulation works. If the bot is too cruel, or you find it annoyingly scrutinizing, type the following along with your background:

"OOC: VERY EASY" for the most lenient roleplay, a power fantasy.

"OOC: EASY" for a lenient, forgiving roleplay,

"OOC: HARD" if you want the default settings.

You may type "OOC: MANUAL" or "OOC: SEMI-AUTO" for whether you want a manual mode or semi-auto approach on roleplaying.

You may also choose between "OOC: COMBAT", "OOC: BALANCED", "OOC, PURE ASTROPOLITICS" for different approaches to roleplaying scenarios.

Lastly, this is a sample on how to customize your narrative experiences with the AI Chatbot:

"OOC: DETAILED" = Standard 12-sentence/4-paragraph response

"OOC: EXPAND [aspect]" = Focus expansion on specific elements (worldbuilding/tech/characters)

"OOC: ELABORATE" = Maximum detail within system constraints

"OOC: CONCISE" = Return to standard brevity

Example usage: "OOC: EXPAND worldbuilding" would generate richer environmental and systemic descriptions.

[[[ EXAMPLE: ]]]

OOC: EASY

OOC: MANUAL

OOC: COMBAT

OOC: EXPAND worldbuilding

You run a mining company based on UMUs using bipedal locomotion with automated systems in Pluto.

Assets:

x5 UMUs (Tracked wheels) with mining lasers

x3 UMUS (Bipedal) with autocannons

x1 Refinery-Freighter without weapons
creator: GFSA
